title: Copper Cauldron
description: Adds a copper cauldron, used for various recipes
body:
# Copper Cauldron
[![Badge showing the amount of downloads on modrinth][modrinth-badge]][modrinth]
[![Badge linking to issues on github][github-badge]][github-issues]
[![Badge linking to support on discord][discord-badge]][discord]

![Made for ModFest: Toybox][toybox-badge]

[modrinth]: https://modrinth.com/mod/extended-drawers
[github-issues]: https://github.com/MattiDragon/ExtendedDrawers/issues
[discord]: https://discord.gg/26T5KK2PBv

[modrinth-badge]: https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?color=2d2d2d&colorA=5da545&label=&suffix=%20downloads%20&query=downloads&url=https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/7tZNLHmT&style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=2d2d2d
[github-badge]: https://img.shields.io/badge/dynamic/json?query=value&url=https://img.shields.io/github/issues-raw/mattidragon/coppercauldron.json&label=&logo=github&color=2d2d2d&style=flat&labelColor=6e5494&logoColor=2d2d2d&suffix=%20issues
[discord-badge]: https://img.shields.io/discord/760524772189798431?label=&logo=discord&color=2d2d2d&style=flat&labelColor=5865f2&logoColor=2d2d2d
[toybox-badge]: https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModFest/art/refs/heads/v2/badge/svg/toybox/compact.svg

Copper Cauldron is a mod that adds a copper cauldron to the game. 
On the surface it's very similar to the vanilla cauldron, but it can do a lot more.
Currently, copper cauldrons can do the following:
- Store water, honey and potions
- Turn honeycomb into honey with water and heat

More features are planned for the future, such as:
- Brewing potions
- Cooking soups and stews
- Various other crafting recipes

## Other Info
### Modpack permission
You can use this mod in any modpack as long as you don't reupload the mod.
You can get a direct download link from modrinth if you need,
but I'd prefer you create your modpacks on modrinth or curseforge directly.

### Other websites
This mod is only officially available on [modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/copper-cauldron) and [github](https://github.com/mattidragon/coppercauldron).
Any other sites are third-party reuploads and should not be trusted.

### Porting and Forking
You can read my policy on [forking and porting mods](https://gist.github.com/MattiDragon/6b9e71e8516447f53f0d5fb296ab8868).

Current target: 1.21.8.

## Licencing
The mod is licensed under the Apache License 2.0.
You are free to use the mods code in any way you want as long as you follow the license and
credit me for the original (link is enough).
